sections.sectionTitle: David in Biakinn Lam Nasep Solomon Tungah Ap

verses.text: David in Jerusalem-a Israel-te lakah zaneite, minamte sungah zaneite, kumpipa' na a sem a khente sungah uliante, a tultul-a a ukte, a zaza-a a ukte, neihsa khempeuh leh kumpipa' ganhingte leh a tapate a kemte pen, kumpi inn-a zaneite, a thahat mite, leh gal a hang tawntungte khempeuh tawh a khawm hi

Tua ciangin Kumpi David a khe-in dingto-in, “Ka sanggamte leh ka mite aw, ka thugen hong za un. Topa' Thuciamna Singkuang-a' ding leh i Pasian' khengakna dingin tawlngakna biakinn khat lam ding ka lungsim sungah om a, a lamna ding ka kiging hi
Ahih hangin Pasian in kei kiangah, ‘Nang pen galhang khat hi-in sisan tampi luangsak na hih manin keima min dingin biakinn na lam thei kei ding hi,’ hong ci hi

Ahi zongin Israel Topa Pasian in Israel tungah kumpi ahi tawntung dingin ka pa' innkuan khempeuh panin kei hong teel hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in makai-in Judah teel a, tua ciangin Judah innkuan panin ka pa' innkuan teel a, tua ciangin ka pa' tate lak panin Israel khempeuh tungah kumpi-in kei hong bawl ding kei tungah amah lungkim hi
Tua ciangin ka tapate khempeuh lak panin (bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kei tungah tapa tampi hong pia hi) Israel-te a ukin Topa' kumpi tokhom tungah a tu dingin amah in ka tapa Solomon teel khin hi
Amah in kei kiangah, ‘Ka biakinn leh a inntualte a bawl dingpa pen na tapa Solomon ahi hi; bang hang hiam cih leh ka tapa dingin amah ka teel khin a, kei pen ama pa ka hi ding hi
Amah in ka thupiaknate leh ka biakna ngeina kipte tuni-a mah bangin zuih ding a ngaihsut paisuak nak leh ama kumpi gam ka kipsak tawntung ding hi,’ hong ci hi

Tua ahih ciangin tu-in note in hih leitang hoih nei-in note' khit na tate uh tungah gamh-in na nusiat tawntung theihna dingun Topa' mai-ah kikhopna ahi Israel khempeuh' muhna, leh i Pasian' zakna-ah Topa na Pasian uh thupiaknate khempeuh zui-in zong un

“Tu-in nang, ka tapa Solomon aw, na pa' Pasian thei in la, na lungsim khempeuh leh utna lungsim tawh ama na sem in; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in lungsim sung zong a, ngimna leh ngaihsutna khempeuh thei hi. Nangmah in amah na zon' leh nangmah in amah na mu ding hi. Ahih hangin amah na nusiat leh amah in nang hong paiikhia paisuak ding hi
Biakinn dingin inn khat a lam dingin Topa in nang hong teel khin ahih manin tu-in kingaihsun in; thahat in la sem in,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin David in a tapa Solomon tungah biakinn innlim, a innte, a vanmanpha koihnate, a dawl tungnungte, a dei sungnungte, leh hehpihna tokhom-a' dingin inndei a geelna
leh Topa' inn a tualte-a' dingin a lungsimah a ngaihsut khempeuh, a kimkota inndeite khempeuh, Pasian' biakinn sung vanmanpha koihnate, leh a ki-ap letsongte-a' ding vanmanpha koihnate
siampite leh Levi mi a khente, leh Topa' biakinn sungah nasepna khempeuh-a ding; Topa' biakinn sungah nasepna ding umlebeel khempeuh-a' ding
nasepna-ah zat ding kham tawh kibawl umlebeel khempeuh a gihna, nasepna-ah zat dingin ngun tawh kibawl umlebeelte a gihna
nasepna-ah meivakkhuam a kizat ciatna bangin kham meivak khuamte leh a meivakte a gihna, a meivakkhuam leh meivakte a gihna zah ciat, meivakkhuam khat leh a meivakte ngun a gihna
Ompihna Anlum-a' dingin sabuai kham a gihna ciat, ngun sabuaite-a' dingin ngun a gihna
leh sikkeute, kuangte, leh haite-a' dingin kham citak a gihna; kham haipite leh a gihna ciat, ngun haipite leh a gihna ciat
a kisiangsaksa kham tawh kibawl paknamtui biakna tau ding leh a gihna zah ding a geelna; a khate uh zakin Topa' Thuciamna Singkuang a khuh kherub-te' kham leeng ding a geelna zong a pia hi
Nasep ding khempeuh geelsa bangin sep dingin hih thu tawh kizui-in Topa' genna bangin lai-in gelhna tawh amah in hihte khempeuh a siangin a hih hi

Tua ciangin David in a tapa Solomon kiangah, “Thakhauhin hang in la sem in. Lau kei in; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa Pasian, keima Pasian nangawn nang tawh hong om hi. Topa' biakinn sung nasepna khempeuh a kizawh matengin amah in nang hong tamasaklo ding a, hong nusialo ding hi

Tua ciangin Pasian' biakinn-ah nasep khempeuh a sem dingin siampite leh Levi mi a khente om hi. Nasepna khat peuhpeuhah siamna a nei mite in nasepna khempeuhah nang hong huh ding hi. Uliante leh mi khempeuh zong nangma thupiakna bangbangin gamta ding uh hi,” a ci hi.
